summary: Security claims and source/test references are reconciled to the final tree; typecheck, production build, offline dependency review, marketing gates, and Cloudflare packaging dry-run pass. No commit, push, deployment, or external synchronization is claimed by this report.

verification.result: PASS: typecheck succeeded; build verified 4 OpenMLS artifacts/27 inputs and emitted 100 Vite modules (WASM 1233.69 kB, CSS 52.87 kB, JS 589.21 kB) with only the standard bundle-size warning.
